creator: netch@netch.kiev.ua
text:
The following errors appear when trying to compile anything:

/usr/local/llvm34/bin/../lib/clang/3.4/include/module.map:4:12: error: header
      'altivec.h' not found
    header "altivec.h"
           ^
/usr/local/llvm34/bin/../lib/clang/3.4/include/module.map:31:14: error: header
      'cpuid.h' not found
      header "cpuid.h"
             ^

and compilation fails.

Fix: 

I guess this is the same issue as in ports/183799.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install the port and try to compile anything.
